overall settings.title: Lumber
overall settings.description: Run an outfit to {saddlebrown|harvest resources} with a vehicle for hauling.

attribs.name: Accuracy
attribs.description: Increases likelihood of getting better rolls for chopping checks.

attribs.name: Base Power
attribs.description: Values are negative, to change a tree's HP. Similar to *Strength* but additive.

attribs.name: Hiring Capability
attribs.description: 1 for standard rate, while higher numbers make it cost more to hire people.

attribs.name: HP
attribs.description: How much chopping still needs to be done to finish chopping down the tree. Once HP is 0, the tree can be cut into logs.

attribs.name: Mileage Left
attribs.description: What shape a vehicle is in.

attribs.name: Price to Hire
attribs.description: One-time fee (no upkeep required in this scenario)

attribs.name: Repair
attribs.description: What shape a vehicle is in. Higher numbers mean more reliable.

attribs.name: Strength
attribs.description: Increases max cutting progress per chop.

items.name: Acorns
items.description: More difficult to grow than saplings.

items.name: Bridge Framework
items.description:
Under construction. Requires lumber.

When finished (limit reached), [edit **"Bridge Site"** zone](/configure/location/27) to allow passage and clear the color.

items.name: Cash
items.description: Purchase new equipment, and eventually, a new plot of land.

items.name: Desktop Computer
items.description:
Critical for the **Technician.** The **Office Manager** may also want one to handle sales.

When purchased, configure the [Office](/configure/location/11) to place the computer at a position where someone can conveniently sit next to it.

items.name: Feller
items.description: Automatically produces trunks from trees.

items.name: Feller Construction Kit
items.description: Carry this item and move the character next to the hopper, then construct the feller.

items.name: Feller Speed Upgrade
items.description: After purchasing, [modify Pine Trunks](/configure/item/93) to decrease **Feller** recipe duration to **300 seconds.**

items.name: Hardware Store Clerk
items.description: "Hello, what can I get you today?"

items.name: Harness
items.description: Wrap the leather strap around the tree, clipped in place. Use it to shimmy up.

items.name: Hauler Bill of Sale
items.description: After purchasing this item, edit the **Hauler** to place at the **Main Plot** location.

items.name: Honeycomb
items.description: Looks tempting. Smoke drives the bees away. When harvested, takes 24 hours for the bees to replenish.

items.name: Oak Boards
items.description: Cut from logs.

items.name: Oak Log Bonus
items.description: Set by *Oak Chopping Check* on Major Success.

items.name: Oak Logs
items.description: Chop a felled tree into logs, plus any bonus gained during the felling.

items.name: Oak Marked
items.description: Plots are full of trees, but mark only one tree at a time for harvesting.

items.name: Oak Trees
items.description: How many trees are available on the **Main Plot.**

items.name: Office Construction
items.description: Purchase the materials, then construct.

items.name: Old Axe
items.description: Handle has been reattached many times in the past.

items.name: Pine Boards
items.description: Cut from logs.

items.name: Pine Log Bonus
items.description: Set by *Pine Chopping Check* on Major Success.

items.name: Pine Logs
items.description: Chop a felled tree into logs, plus any bonus gained during the felling.

items.name: Pine Marked
items.description: Plots are full of trees, but mark only one tree at a time for harvesting.

items.name: Pine Saplings
items.description: It takes awhile before they are ready to be harvested, but it's better than planting pinecones.

items.name: Pine Trees
items.description: How many trees are available on the **Main Plot.**

items.name: Pine Trunks
items.description: Automatically felled tree lying on the ground.

items.name: Pinecones
items.description: More difficult to grow than saplings.

items.name: Rock
items.description: Landscape feature that prevents this tile from being used.

items.name: Shoe Spikes
items.description: Better grip when climbing the tree.

items.name: Silver Axe
items.description: Highly accurate although not as powerful as a Chainsaw.

items.name: Splitter
items.description: Automatically produces logs from felled trees.

items.name: Splitter Construction Kit
items.description: Carry this item and move the character next to the hopper, then construct the splitter.

items.name: Splitter Speed Upgrade
items.description: After purchasing, [modify Pine Logs](/configure/item/7) to decrease **Splitter** recipe duration to **300 seconds.**

items.name: Steel Axe
items.description: The industry standard.

items.name: Take Off Shoes
items.description: Equip this item to go barefoot and use your natural toes and muscles for decent grip.

items.name: Truck Bill of Sale
items.description: After purchasing this item, set the truck's *Mileage Left* to 20 and *Repair* to 3.

items.name: Warehouse Construction
items.description: Purchase the materials, then construct.

items.name: Wood Bin Bigger
items.description: After purchasing, [modify Pine Logs](/configure/item/7) to double storage for the Wood Bin to **161 logs.**

items.name: Wood Bin Biggest
items.description: After purchasing, [modify Pine Logs](/configure/item/7) to increase storage for the Wood Bin to **501 logs.**

locations.name: Buildings
locations.description: Go to the area where any buildings are for the site.

locations.name: California
locations.description: Now that the railway has access to the gold mines, your company grows like wildfire.

locations.name: Climbing For Honey
locations.description: Use this view for characters to climb a tree, starting from the bottom.

locations.name: Hardware Store
locations.description: Talk to the clerk to exchange goods.

locations.name: Main Plot
locations.description: This plot of land is your family inheritance and the basis for setting up the company. Pine trees have been planted.

locations.name: Office
locations.description: Wooden steps lead up to a raised trailer building. Inside are desks and computers.

locations.name: River
locations.description: There is no way to cross without swimming. A partially constructed railway bridge sits at the narrowest point.

locations.name: Town Hall
locations.description: Hire employees as well as handling any legal paperwork.

locations.name: Warehouse
locations.description: Shelves line the walls on either side.

characters.name: CHAD Wheeler
characters.description:
Controlled Hauling And Driving Wheeler

- Operated remotely: does not require anyone to move/travel with as long as the **Technician** is in the office at a computer
- Solar powered: does not require starting
- Larger capacity than **Truck**
- Can pick up, drop, and store items, although it does not produce them or make purchases

characters.name: HR and Sales Manager
characters.description: Handles sales operations from the office rather than through the **Hardware Store Clerk.**

characters.name: Owner
characters.description: Player character who initially started the company.

characters.name: Technician
characters.description: When sitting by a computer in the office, can operate the **CHAD Wheeler** as well as control production of automated machinery: **Circular Saw,** **Feller,** **Splitter.**

characters.name: Truck
characters.description:
A run-down workhorse with a little left to give. If it breaks down, you may have to buy another vehicle.

Carries logs. Someone must drive (move/travel with) the truck.

characters.name: Wood Bin
characters.description:
Stores a large quantity of logs from auto production.
Keep at least one log in the bin to manage collection.
The bin is difficult to move — use a vehicle instead to transport the logs.

events.name: Chopping Check — Oak
events.description:
- **Major Success:** Gain 50% more logs
- **Any Failure:** The attempt didn't land cleanly — restores 20% **HP**
- **Major Failure:** Run *Chopping Mishap Type*

events.name: Chopping Check — Pine
events.description:
- **Major Success:** Gain 50% more logs
- **Any Failure:** The attempt didn't land cleanly — restores 20% **HP**
- **Major Failure:** Run *Chopping Mishap Type*

events.name: Chopping Mishap Type
events.description: Run to get details on what happened after a **Chopping Check** fails.

events.name: Climb Honey Tree
events.description:
Success at making the climb up.

- On **Minor Failure,** try again. For repeated minor failures, try again later when it's not raining.
- On **Major Failure,** fall and sustain injury.

events.name: Hire
events.description:
You must have the required funds in order to hire someone — do not go into debt by hiring.
After hiring someone, configure them to **Show in Overview.**

events.name: Mark a Pine
events.description:
Choose the grid coordinates of the next tree to be actively harvested on a plot.

**{saddlebrown|When Pine Marked quantity is 0}**:
- Sets the marked tree position to the new coordinates at the *Main Plot*.
- Produces a *Pine Marked* from *Plot 1 Trees* so quantity goes from 0 to 1.
- Sets HP to max.

Now the tree is ready for *Swing to Chop Pine*.

events.name: Mark an Oak
events.description: Choose the grid coordinates of the next tree, and prepare the tree for *Swing to Chop*.

events.name: Operate Sawmill
events.description:
Chance of success. Roll to determine how well a batch of logs turns into boards, or if something perhaps goes wrong.

Use *Very Easy* difficulty, or *Moderate* if there is a large number of logs to be processed.

events.name: Rather Nice
events.description: Roll whenever you accidentally doze off IRL while waiting for an idle task to finish.

events.name: Start Engine
events.description: Start the engine once per trip — leave it running while you work at the current location.

events.name: Swing to Chop Oak
events.description: For the final blow, or after rolling a natural 1, do a **Chopping Check — Oak.**

events.name: Swing to Chop Pine
events.description: For the final blow, or after rolling a natural 1, do a **Chopping Check — Pine.**
